socio_sim/config.py::RunConfig.campaign_.justification: no-op multiplier default (1.0 = demo campaigns unchanged, determinism preserved); the aggregate-matched profile sets it to ground the demo-ad CTR in the verified iPinYou display measurement

socio_sim/config.py::RunConfig.churn_rat.justification: synthetic scenario default (RunConfig.churn_rate); editable and surfaced with the run configuration

socio_sim/config.py::RunConfig.diurnal_p.justification: no-op diurnal phase shift default (0 = curve unchanged, determinism preserved); the aggregate-matched profile shifts it to align the activity peak with the source-checked Golder 2007 evening peak

socio_sim/graph/metrics.py::CLUSTERING_E.justification: graph size above which clustering uses the NetworkX approximation instead of the exact O(n<k^2>) computation; a performance switch, documented inline

socio_sim/ops.py::LOW_DISK_WARN_BYTES.justification: low-disk warning threshold for /api/ready and --status; an operational heuristic, not a modelled quantity

socio_sim/pipeline.py::REPLAY_AGENT_LIMI.justification: agent count above which deterministic replay auto-verification is skipped by default for runtime; a performance switch

socio_sim/policy/engine.py::PolicyDecisi.justification: synthetic scenario default (PolicyDecision.retention_months); editable and surfaced with the run configuration

socio_sim/policy/engine.py::SEVERE_FLOOR.justification: synthetic severity floor for severe-category policy handling; a scenario mechanics threshold

socio_sim/validation/seed_protocol.py::C.justification: conventional 3-sigma history-matching implausibility cutoff; the same threshold socio_sim/validation/calibrate.py documents (I < 3), restated for the seed protocol

socio_sim/web/app.py::MAX_BODY_BYTES.justification: max accepted POST body (ASVS V5 DoS guard); documented in SECURITY.md control 5
